content: Frontend closetStore singleton with prewarm + subscribe + incremental sync + mutations
AppLayout prewarms after auth (eager load, before navigation)
Closet.jsx reads from store, filters client-side, no refetch on nav
ItemDetail edit + delete patches store; AddItem create patches store
Home count chip reads from store too (no extra round-trip)
Verified live: SPA Closet revisits = 0 API calls; instant paint
